theorems.name: Direct method for constrained variational functionals
theorems.reduces: organize existence proofs into coercivity, compactness, lower semicontinuity, constraint preservation, and Euler-Lagrange verification
prerequisites: constraint closed under the chosen convergence
verificationHints: check each term is finite under the stated exponent range
differentiate the functional along admissible variations
verify the constraint derivative and multiplier equation
preferredRecipe: split the functional into computable terms
check coercivity or boundedness from below
verify first variation and constraint derivative
state the remaining analytic compactness assumption
avoidPatterns: do not infer compactness from boundedness without naming the compactness input
do not hide the Lagrange multiplier or constraint derivative
theorems.wolframHint: Use verification_template first_variation_derivative for local variation checks and wolfram_simplify for scaling exponent algebra.

theorems.name: Barrier construction for maximum principle arguments
signals: 闸函数|辅助函数|上下解
theorems.reduces: verify the sign of an operator applied to a candidate barrier and compare boundary values before applying a maximum principle
verificationHints: compute L[barrier] with the chosen sign convention
record parameter choices for large or small constants
preferredRecipe: choose constants from the residual inequalities
avoidPatterns: do not apply the maximum principle before checking the boundary comparison on every boundary component
theorems.wolframHint: Use verification_template barrier_operator_check, wolfram_differentiate, and wolfram_simplify for explicit residuals.

theorems.name: Moving spheres and Kelvin transform checks
theorems.reduces: turn a comparison argument into checks of the transformed expression, boundary sign, and allowable parameter increment
verificationHints: separate narrow, middle, and far-region assumptions
avoidPatterns: do not merge region-specific assumptions into one global claim
theorems.wolframHint: Use verification_template kelvin_power_check plus wolfram_simplify for power identities and parameter inequalities.

theorems.name: ODE reduction and residual verification
signals: 常微分|径向|微分不等式
theorems.reduces: separate explicit ODE residual checks from qualitative monotonicity, phase, or comparison arguments
verificationHints: substitute candidate solution into the ODE
verify radial Laplacian or transformed derivatives
avoidPatterns: do not let DSolve replace a qualitative comparison proof
theorems.wolframHint: Use wolfram_dsolve for explicit model equations and verification_template ode_residual_check or radial_laplacian_check for residuals.

theorems.name: Hessian quotient matrix calculus
theorems.reduces: verify explicit matrix derivatives, traces, determinants, and symmetric-polynomial identities while keeping ellipticity cone assumptions visible
verificationHints: check sign assumptions are cone hypotheses, not algebraic consequences
verify large-constant choices in barrier estimates
preferredRecipe: write the Hessian or coefficient matrix
separate cone assumptions from Wolfram algebra
avoidPatterns: do not infer positive definiteness from a formal determinant alone
theorems.wolframHint: Use wolfram_matrix and verification_template hessian_matrix_invariants for explicit matrix algebra.

theorems.name: Manifold and representation-theoretic integral checks
signals: 流形|表示论|球面积分|不变测度
theorems.reduces: check local coordinate integrals, normalization constants, and symmetry reductions while keeping geometric assumptions explicit
verificationHints: compute the Jacobian or model integral
preferredRecipe: lift result back to invariant statement
avoidPatterns: do not treat a chart computation as global without checking coverage and singular sets
theorems.wolframHint: Use wolfram_integrate, wolfram_simplify, and wolfram_transform for explicit chart or special-function integrals.
